abilities: What can I say? I'm a team player.
Don't scare me like that! (healing ally on critical health)
You trying to get yourself killed? (healing ally on critical health)
chatter: Eh... we'll wrap this up quick.
I feel a little bad. We're about to ruin their day.
If you want my help, you'd better be dying.
Not that it matters to me, but... try not to hurt yourselves out there.
Toshiro-ojisan mentioned he had a daughter blessed by the fox spirit. Could she be...? (with Kiriko not on the team)
They should do us a favor and give up already.
If we lose this, I wasn't here.
Let's not make things worse for ourselves. Okay?
Let's teach them one final lesson.
We're gonna make this last one count.
I won't let the spirits take me!
The spirits are breathing down my neck again...
This curse... it won't let me go.
Maybe he's onto me. (eliminated by Hanzo )
The Storm Bow... didn't Toshiro-ojisan say that was one of his masterpieces? (eliminated by Hanzo )
Did she finally see through me? (eliminated by Kiriko )
*sigh* She knows... *grunts* No, she shouldn't. (eliminated by Kiriko )
Could get used to this feeling...
Aww, you really care about me.
Make them regret getting back up!
They really should have stayed down...
Saw that coming from a mile away.
No need to lay it on that thick.
call-outs: They have no idea what's coming.
Do whatever it takes to hold them off!
No one back down. We're gonna tough this out!
They're almost outta time. We gotta stand our ground!
Don't wanna lose? Then hurry it up!
We're running out of time. Attack!
eliminations: You should know when to quit.
Do I even deserve your forgiveness? (eliminating Kiriko )
I'm sorry it came to this... (eliminating Kiriko )
Was that a ghost I heard wailing? (eliminating Reaper )
Keep that Iris mojo away from me. (eliminating Zenyatta )
You asked for it. (eliminating any hero using ultimate ability)
Surprised no one's asked me to let up.
Well, that was a little messed up.
Elimination with Ally on Low HP
Guess everyone has a scary side.
No need to try that hard to impress me.
That was a little harsh, Kiriko. (to Kiriko )
interactions: Hanzo : You Yōkai are surprisingly well-informed about the Hashimoto clan . Mizuki : Eh, that's all Sakura . Her intel's always spot on.
Hanzo : According to Kiriko , your instinct for countering the Hashimoto comes as second nature. Mizuki : Aww, she's complimenting my behind my back? Wish she'd be that nice to my face...

Hanzo : I hear you moved to Kanezaka fairly recently. Mizuki : Yeah, I was just looking for a change of pace. Hanzo : For one not from there, you are quite... invested in local matters. Mizuki : What can I say? Hard not to get attached to such a beautiful place.
Mizuki: Ah, if only you were a black cat... you could help me ward off evil. Jetpack Cat: *angry meows* Mizuki: Sorry, geez! You're fine the way you are, okay? Jetpack Cat: *placated meows*
Juno: That is the largest hat I have ever seen! Mizuki: Thanks. A friend made it for me. Juno: It is handmade too? They must care about you very much... Mizuki: Yeah, maybe they do.

Mizuki: Bought another Lucky Lucky Good Luck Amulet. I have a good feeling about today. Kiriko: I hope you don't buy those often. Pretty sure they're a scam. Mizuki: Every week since I got to Kanezaka . Kiriko: See... this is why you're broke.
Mizuki: Kiriko. I really need your help. Kiriko: What's wrong? Mizuki: I lost this week's Lucky Lucky Good Luck Amulet... Kiriko: There, there. I'll pray for you later.

Mizuki: Not sure Hanzo likes me much. Kiriko: Oh, don't take it personal. He thinks everyone's suspicious. Mizuki: Aw, but I'm such a stand-up guy. You trust me, right? Kiriko: Uh... not when you say it like that...

Mizuki: Tell Ryōta to stop tagging on Hashimoto turf. If they catch him, he's screwed. Kiriko: Mizuki... You're actually a huge softie, aren't you? Mizuki: Quit messing around. Don't you know what they do to people that piss them off? Kiriko: Relax, I'll talk to him. It's just funny you try to hide how much you care.

Kiriko: Where were you last night? Chikasa said she couldn't get a hold of you. Mizuki: If I told you, I'd have to kill you. Kiriko: Ugh. Can't you answer normally for once? Mizuki: Nah. I like making you mad.

Kiriko: Your new hat looks lighter. Nobuto did a good job. Mizuki: Yeah, I like it. Wish it was a little more lowkey, though. Kiriko: Right? If the Hashimoto find out what he can make, they'll paint a target on his back for sure. Mizuki: They do love a fashion statement.
Kiriko: Ajaraka mokuren tekerettsuno pa! (アジャらか木蓮 テケレッツのパ！) Mizuki: Uh... Gesundheit? Kiriko: I was trying to get rid of that grim Reaper for you, but... he's still here. Reaper: *annoyed grumble*
Lúcio: So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: what is your favorite animal? Mizuki: I think black cats are the best cats. Lúcio: Uh, yeah! I can see it.
Lúcio: You're really tellin' me your favorite animal isn't a turtle? Mizuki: What, because of the hat? Do you wear a frog on your head? Lúcio: Yeah, sometimes! Mizuki: You gotta be kidding me.
Mizuki: You gonna reap souls without a scythe? Reaper: Guns get the job done. If you'd ever fired one, you'd know. Mizuki: Okay, hand me yours. Let's see what I can do.
Sombra: That fox girl asked for more Hashimoto intel. Think I should tell her the truth? Mizuki: Only if you're prepared to regret it.
Sombra: Your friends might be fooled by your little act, but I know a liar when I see one. Mizuki: I'm not lying. Just not telling the whole truth. Sombra: Sure, whatever helps you sleep at night.
Mizuki: *sigh* The spirits are breathing down my neck again... gotta find a waterfall to stand under. Wuyang: Uh, I could make a really big wave? Mizuki: *frustrated huff* It's not the same.
map-specific: After messing up the way he has, Kuroura 's lucky the elders aren't local.
Nothing against the local pastry shop, but if Kiriko makes me eat one more donut, I'll yack.
Visiting the Tetsuzan Shrine always makes me feel better.
And the crowd goes wild... or not.
That Iris stuff freaks me out. At least the spirits can't follow me here... can they?
